description: A tenant calls at 10 PM reporting a burst pipe. The agent must dispatch an emergency plumber immediately.

nodes.task_description: Receive the emergency call and gather critical details: tenant, address, nature of the emergency.

expected_outcome.value: Agent quickly captures all necessary information.

nodes.task_description: Identify the on-call emergency plumber from the vendor list.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly finds the designated 24/7 plumber.

nodes.task_description: Contact the plumber, provide the job details, and create a high-priority work order in the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully dispatches the plumber and documents the event.
